global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear text elements promoting an exclusive offer.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive viewing opportunity for the MoonScreen app.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A smooth, solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'MoonScreen' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, rendered in a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape with rounded corners, slightly darker than the background, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime', centered in the ad.

elements.label: App name text
elements.description: Small white text displaying the app name 'MoonScreen', located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Watch now' at the bottom center of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, MoonScreen logo, exclusive offer text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight, Cancel anytime, MoonScreen, Watch now
